snippet.title: Yale Engineering Dean's Invited Speaker Series featuring C.C. Wei, CEO, TSMC
snippet.description:
Yale Engineering Dean Jeffrey Brock '92 invites the entire Yale community to attend a series of insightful talks featuring distinguished industry leaders on a variety of topics across engineering and related fields.

C.C. Wei '85 PhD (Electrical Engineering), the CEO of the largest manufacturer of semiconductors in the world has shaped the electronics industry. From smartphones to supercomputers, microchips developed at TSMC continue to power and dominate the electronic manufacturing industry. C.C. Wei discusses his trajectory from Yale's campus to a prominent role in industry.

For more information on the Yale School of Engineering & Applied Science, visit https://seas.yale.edu. For more videos, please visit the Yale Engineering YouTube channel @yaleengineering.

snippet.title: Ching-Wen Cho, Senior Director of Business Management, TSMC North America
snippet.description:
The best engineering breakthroughs come from a diversity of perspectives. At TSMC, you’ll enjoy a diverse and inclusive workplace with ambitious peers from different backgrounds, always pushing you toward your best work.

"TSMC is very supportive of promoting diversity. I don't feel my gender has limited my opportunities at all. We believe our accomplishments is the best proof of our merit." says Ching-Wen Cho, Director of Business Management of TSMC North America. 

Become part of a unique team of technology enthusiasts joined in a common purpose – to unleash innovations that lead to sustainable economic growth and a smarter, better world.

snippet.title: TSMC says Kaohsiung fabs to switch to more advanced processes
snippet.description:
Contract chipmaker TSMC has announced a 30% decline in net profit in the first quarter. Net profit was better than expected at NT$206.9 billion, but it was still down 30% from the previous quarter. Earnings per share landed at NT$7.89. The chipmaker expects weak demand to linger into the second quarter, but sees sales picking up in the second half of the year. During its Thursday earnings call, the company also addressed reports of a delay at its Kaohsiung project. 

At its virtual earnings call, TSMC announced consolidated revenue of NT$508.63 billion for the first quarter, a quarterly decline of 18.7%. Net profit tumbled 30% to NT$206.9 billion, with earnings per share landing at NT$7.89. Gross margin for the quarter was 56.3%. TSMC projected a slow second quarter due to inventory adjustments, with recovery to start only in the second half of the year. It revised its annual U.S. dollar revenue forecast, projecting a drop of 1 to 6%.

Voice of C.C. Wei
TSMC CEO
We believe we are passing through the bottom of the cycle of TSMC business in the second quarter. In the second half of this year is expected to be stronger than the first half. Our customer’s demand for 3-nanometer chips exceeds our ability to supply. 3-nanometer to be fully utilized in 2023.

Citing strong demand for 3-nanometer chips and a positive outlook on future expansion, TSMC said it would maintain capital spending between US$32 billion and US$36 billion this year. TSMC also addressed concerns about its projects in Kaohsiung. It said it would continue to invest in Taiwan, but would switch from 28-nanometer chips to more advanced processes.

Voice of C.C. Wei
TSMC CEO
Our fab construction continues. If we build 28-nanometer, probably it won’t be financially feasible. Adjusted it to become more advanced node, which are still in shortage.

TSMC said it faces challenges in the year ahead, including high costs for overseas expansion, constraints in production capacity, and inflation. A 17% rise in April’s electricity costs is expected to cut annual gross profit margin by 0.5%. Over in the U.S., TSMC has applied for US$15 billion in subsidies, and is negotiating disclosure requirements with authorities. Its German expansion plans are still under evaluation, it said.

Voice of C.C. Wei
TSMC CEO
We are engaging with customers and partners to evaluate the possibility of building a specialty fab focusing on automotive-specific technologies based on the demand from customers. 

Reports say TSMC plans to expand in the German state of Saxony. During a visit to Taiwan, Saxony’s minister of science declined to comment directly on the matter.

Sebastian Gemkow
Saxony state minister of science
Of course we are welcoming everybody who is interested in investing. I’d say we are well prepared for everybody. We have everything in infrastructures they have what is necessary.

TSMC is staying cautious, as it navigates strong industry headwinds. But with countries the world over vying for its advanced technology, it’s still in position to maintain its global market share.

snippet.title: CGTN interviews China International Cooperation Agency spokesman Xu Wei on BRI
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://www.cgtn.com/video

China's International Development and Cooperation Agency (CIDCA) was established five years ago as a foreign aid and development body. Our CGTN reporter Cen Ziyuan sat down with spokesman Xu Wei to discuss the Agency's role in supporting the Belt and Road Initiative. Xu explains to us the role of CIDCA under the Belt and Road Initiative. According to the latest data, more than 180 countries and international organizations support the Initiative. In the past decade, China has arranged more than 2,000 assistance projects in more than 120 countries and established more than 80 economic and trade cooperation zones. Meanwhile, the spokesman responded to the claim by the Western world saying China is using the Belt and Road Initiative to bring countries into what they call a "debt trap". Xu rejected such accusations adding that no countries have been put into such a position. China has fully implemented the G20 Debt Service Suspension Initiative. He has also explained the relationship between the BRI and the Global Development Initiative.

This series is adapted from Bu Yi Ma Qi‘s novel of the same name. It tells the story of how Dong Dong'en, a top-tier customer service representative, captures the heart of Lou Yuan, a client representative, with her own charm in the battle of wits and courage. Due to a misunderstanding between the top-tier customer service representative Dong Dong’en (played by Xu Lu) and the client representative Lou Yuan (played by Miles Wei), the mundane workplace life becomes a whirlwind. After starting the job at the client’s office, not only does Dong Dong'en excel in showcasing her top-tier professionality, but she also captures Lou Yuan's heart with her own charm in the battle of wits and courage with the client. snippet.title: 姜雪宁片场砸琴吓到谢危 | Story of Kunning Palace | 宁安如梦 | iQIYI
snippet.description:
▶️Watch more episodes on iQIYI App: https://bit.ly/iQIYIapp2022
👉Find the best iQIYI march on iQIYI Website: https://bit.ly/iQIYIweb2022
Join membership for more exclusive titles and perks: https://bit.ly/JoinSuperKiwi
 
【Introduction】It is directed by Zhu Ruibin (Ashes of Love), starring Bai Lu (Ordinary Greatness, One and Only), Zhang Linghe (Love Between Fairy and Devil, Flourish in Time), and Wang Xingyue (Delicacies Destiny). Jiang Xuening (played by Bai Lu) had gone to great lengths to become empress, but was forced to commit suicide during a palace mutiny. Now, Jiang Xuening's dream is to get away from power and have control over her own life. However, by mistake, she has joined the palace as a tutor and becomes a student of the imperial master Xie Wei (played by Zhang Linghe). While receiving Xie Wei's teachings, Jiang Xuening secretly plans to stop Yan Lin's (played by Zhou Junwei) upcoming "Blood Crown Ceremony". With Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei's plan, the Yan family's lives were saved. After the "Blood Crown Ceremony", Jiang Xuening is inadvertently involved in the imperial court's plan to eliminate those rebels against Pingnan King, and infiltrates into the enemy camp with Zhang Zhe (played by Wang Xingyue). When the enemy country Yue comes to invade, the Princess Shen Zhiyi (played by Liu Xiening) resolutely embarks on the road to peace. In order to save her friend Shen Zhiyi, Jiang Xuening goes north with Xie Wei to invade Yue. In the midst of many crises, Xie Wei protects Jiang Xuening even at the risk of hurting himself, and the two of them grow to love each other. However, a bigger conspiracy gradually surfaced, which pointed to the truth of the Pingnan King incident twenty years ago. In the end, Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei teamed up to uncover the truth of that year, Jiang Xuening also used love to convert Xie Wei, and the two finally became a couple.

【Cast】Bai Lu, Zhang Linghe, Wang Xingyue, Liu Xiening

snippet.description:

【Introduction】It is directed by Zhu Ruibin (Ashes of Love), starring Bai Lu (Ordinary Greatness, One and Only), Zhang Linghe (Love Between Fairy and Devil, Flourish in Time), and Wang Xingyue (Delicacies Destiny). Jiang Xuening (played by Bai Lu) had gone to great lengths to become empress, but was forced to commit suicide during a palace mutiny. Now, Jiang Xuening's dream is to get away from power and have control over her own life. However, by mistake, she has joined the palace as a tutor and becomes a student of the imperial master Xie Wei (played by Zhang Linghe). While receiving Xie Wei's teachings, Jiang Xuening secretly plans to stop Yan Lin's (played by Zhou Junwei) upcoming "Blood Crown Ceremony". With Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei's plan, the Yan family's lives were saved. After the "Blood Crown Ceremony", Jiang Xuening is inadvertently involved in the imperial court's plan to eliminate those rebels against Pingnan King, and infiltrates into the enemy camp with Zhang Zhe (played by Wang Xingyue). When the enemy country Yue comes to invade, the Princess Shen Zhiyi (played by Liu Xiening) resolutely embarks on the road to peace. In order to save her friend Shen Zhiyi, Jiang Xuening goes north with Xie Wei to invade Yue. In the midst of many crises, Xie Wei protects Jiang Xuening even at the risk of hurting himself, and the two of them grow to love each other. However, a bigger conspiracy gradually surfaced, which pointed to the truth of the Pingnan King incident twenty years ago. In the end, Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei teamed up to uncover the truth of that year, Jiang Xuening also used love to convert Xie Wei, and the two finally became a couple.

【Cast】Bai Lu, Zhang Linghe, Wang Xingyue, Liu Xiening

【Introduction】It is directed by Zhu Ruibin (Ashes of Love), starring Bai Lu (Ordinary Greatness, One and Only), Zhang Linghe (Love Between Fairy and Devil, Flourish in Time), and Wang Xingyue (Delicacies Destiny). Jiang Xuening (played by Bai Lu) had gone to great lengths to become empress, but was forced to commit suicide during a palace mutiny. Now, Jiang Xuening's dream is to get away from power and have control over her own life. However, by mistake, she has joined the palace as a tutor and becomes a student of the imperial master Xie Wei (played by Zhang Linghe). While receiving Xie Wei's teachings, Jiang Xuening secretly plans to stop Yan Lin's (played by Zhou Junwei) upcoming "Blood Crown Ceremony". With Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei's plan, the Yan family's lives were saved. After the "Blood Crown Ceremony", Jiang Xuening is inadvertently involved in the imperial court's plan to eliminate those rebels against Pingnan King, and infiltrates into the enemy camp with Zhang Zhe (played by Wang Xingyue). When the enemy country Yue comes to invade, the Princess Shen Zhiyi (played by Liu Xiening) resolutely embarks on the road to peace. In order to save her friend Shen Zhiyi, Jiang Xuening goes north with Xie Wei to invade Yue. In the midst of many crises, Xie Wei protects Jiang Xuening even at the risk of hurting himself, and the two of them grow to love each other. However, a bigger conspiracy gradually surfaced, which pointed to the truth of the Pingnan King incident twenty years ago. In the end, Jiang Xuening and Xie Wei teamed up to uncover the truth of that year, Jiang Xuening also used love to convert Xie Wei, and the two finally became a couple.
